Inside Unity

HOW IT WORKS

Inside the Machine

01

Install Plugin

Drop the Valior AI folder into your Unity Assets directory. It compiles automatically — no package manager needed.

02

Enter Your Goal

Type what you want to build in plain English. The agent reads your scene context and generates production-ready code.

03

Ship Faster

Scripts save directly to your Assets folder. Errors get diagnosed and fixed. You stay in flow, always.

Common Questions

Does this work with all Unity versions?+
Yes. Valior AI works with Unity 2021.3 LTS and newer. It uses standard C# and IMGUI — no external packages or dependencies required.
What counts as a request?+
Each AI call — Generate Script, Fix Error, Explain Code, or Quick Action — counts as one request. The counter resets daily at midnight UTC.
Can I upgrade or cancel anytime?+
Absolutely. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel with no friction. No lock-ins, no cancellation fees. Your API key stays valid to end of period.
Is my code sent to any third parties?+
Requests are processed via the OpenAI API. Your code is sent only to generate responses and is not stored or used for training by Valior Studios.
